extracted.title: COMPLETED: West Lateral-100 Pigging (4246), ID2 Cycle, March 28, 2026
extracted.description:
Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) notifies customers that pigging on West Lateral-100 is now complete. As a result, the Delivery capacity at Cameron LNG (4246) will be reinstated to Total Capacity effective Intraday-2 Cycle for Gas Day March 28, and Evening Cycle for Gas Day March 29, 2026.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.

***Previous Posting***

Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) reminds customers of upcoming pigging on West Lateral-100 beginning on Friday, March 27, 2026, through Monday, March 30, 2026. As a result, the Delivery capacity at Cameron LNG (4246) will be reduced to 650,000 (Primary Only) effective Timely Cycle for Gas Day Friday, March 27, 2026.

CGT anticipates this restriction may result in curtailments to Interruptible, Secondary Firm, and Primary Firm services. Please see the details provided below for more information.

Cameron LNG (4246)
- Estimated Capacity Setting: 650,000 Dth
- Design Capacity: 800,000 Dth
- Posted Percentage: 81%

Due to the potential impact to firm service, CGT encourages customers to monitor the scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity screen on Informational Postings, as nominations can fluctuate based on market conditions.

Reservation Charge Credits (RCCs) will be determined per the process set forth in the General Terms and Conditions, Section 40 of CGT’s FERC Gas Tariff (Tariff). By means of this notice, CGT is establishing the 7-day Average Usage Quantity to be the period of February 24 - March 2, 2026, pursuant to the provisions in the Tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
